title: French Berry Tart
description: A classic French dessert featuring a buttery pastry crust topped with a sweet and tangy berry filling.

ingredients.name: Unsalted Butter
ingredients.notes: Chilled and cut into small pieces

instructions: Roll out the tart pastry and place it in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the granulated sugar, flour, and salt.
Add the cold butter to the bowl and use a pastry blender or your fingertips to work it into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press the mixture into the tart shell, making sure to evenly cover the bottom and sides.
Bake the crust for 18-20 minutes, or until it is golden brown.
While the crust is baking, prepare the berry filling by washing and hulling the berries.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and a pinch of salt.
Once the crust is ready, let it cool slightly before pouring the berry filling into the shell.
Top the tart with the berry filling and drizzle with a little bit of granulated sugar.
Garnish with minty whipped cream, if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
